/**
 * Fusion TS Deep Merge
 * --------------------
 * Recursively merges objects while protecting against Prototype Pollution.
 * Essential for merging configuration objects securely.
 */

function isObject(item: any): boolean {
  return (item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item));
}

export function deepMerge(target: any, source: any): any {
  // Guard against prototype pollution
  if (target === null || source === null) return target;
  
  const output = Object.assign({}, target);
  
  if (isObject(target) && isObject(source)) {
    Object.keys(source).forEach(key => {
      // SECURITY: Prevent overwriting internal prototype
      if (key === '__proto__' || key === 'constructor' || key === 'prototype') {
        return;
      }

      if (isObject(source[key])) {
        if (!(key in target)) {
          Object.assign(output, { [key]: source[key] });
        } else {
          output[key] = deepMerge(target[key], source[key]);
        }
      } else {
        Object.assign(output, { [key]: source[key] });
      }
    });
  }
  
  return output;
}
